summary: A fake hacking app with dramatic terminal effects and progress bars.

existing_features.title: Add an animated hacking progress bar to the Terminal page that triggers when the 'hack' command is entered, showing a multi-stage progress sequence with labels like 'Bypassing firewall...', 'Injecting payload...', 'Extracting data...' and a dramatic completion message.

Add animated terminal output to the Terminal page so that command responses are printed character-by-character or line-by-line with a typewriter effect, making the output feel more dramatic and authentic.
